title: KL Was Just Okay
description: A quick stop in KL — the Petronas Towers are impressive at night, but the city didn't grab us the way other places did. Still glad we went.
coverAlt: Petronas Twin Towers soaring into the night sky, viewed from directly below with the skybridge connecting them

images.alt: Petronas Twin Towers lit up at night, shot from ground level looking straight up with the skybridge visible between them
images.caption: Twin builidings of the Petronas Towers in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, standing tall against a dark sky.
